texto: A guide to overcome challenges for effective multi-generational communication.With Invincible Summer we get on better, have more respect and better understanding.This is by speeding up our interactions, finding ways to get with other people, and also getting our due recognition and appreciation. And it only takes simple steps
explicacao: Citação de Ann J. Polya sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “A guide to overcome challenges for effective multi-generational communication.With Invincible Sum…” articula reflexao, self-improvement, better em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
